evidence: "I love 'Lord of the Rings', I love unicorns and dragons and magical amulets, I love adventure and romance and humor"
"I absolutely love it. I can watch it over and over again, and I don't think I'd ever get tired of it."
"The animation is beautiful, and the music is superb. Lex de Azevedo is a brilliant songwriter, and Richard Rich is a terrific director."

"This movie is very innocent and genuine, something that you don't see very much of these days; with all these R-rated movies packed with violence and vulgarity and sexuality and heaven knows what else."
"I know this is based on what really happened, and I know this is supposed to be a dramatic love story (I'm a sucker for romance), but there are certain things you just don't care to see on-screen."
"This movie is wonderful. Although it didn't exactly make me cry, it did touch me in a sentimental way."
"The animation is superior (I'm especially impressed with how they animated Tarzan himself--all those muscles look real convincing; Glen Keane, the designer of Tarzan, must really know his anatomy)"
"The animation is brilliant, the music is flawless, and the actors are superb."
"I fell in love with Frodo and Sam (I am now officially a fan of Elijah Wood, and a fan of Sean Astin)"
"The people at Disney certainly did an excellent job on improving the original movie."
"The animation is beautiful, and the music is superb."
"This movie is a perfect Easter treat for the whole family. It's beautiful and heartwarming, from the beginning to the very end."
"Anyone who is not affected by this scene would have to have a heart of stone."
"This movie is just so beautiful. And the story it teaches is simply priceless."

summary: The user has a strong preference for fantasy and family-oriented films, particularly those with beautiful animation and emotional depth. They appreciate high production quality and are loyal to creators like Disney, often enjoying simple narratives that evoke strong feelings.
